Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as 10d217a63ade051730833bc0356d15b7d32fe87a

9 is the latest approved patch-set.
The change was submitted with unreviewed changes in the following files:

```
The name of the file: src/dawn/common/Constants.h
Insertions: 1, Deletions: 0.

@@ -113,6 +113,7 @@
 static constexpr uint32_t kMaxDynamicStorageBuffersPerPipelineLayout = 16u;
 
 // Default limit for dynamic binding arrays.
+// TODO(https://issues.chromium.org/issues/435317394): Update once the spec decides on a value.
 static constexpr uint32_t kMaxDynamicBindingArraySize = 50'000;
 
 }  // namespace dawn
```
```
The name of the file: src/dawn/native/Limits.cpp
Insertions: 2, Deletions: 2.

@@ -117,9 +117,9 @@
   X(v1, Maximum, maxImmediateSize,       0,    0,    16,  32,  64)
 
 // Limits for the dynamic binding array.
-//                                                                   compat  tier0          tier1
+//                                                                   compat  tier0
 #define LIMITS_DYNAMIC_BINDING_ARRAY(X) \
-  X(dynamicBindingArrayLimits, Maximum, maxDynamicBindingArraySize,       0,    50'000,    50'000)
+  X(dynamicBindingArrayLimits, Maximum, maxDynamicBindingArraySize,       0,    50'000)
 
 // TODO(crbug.com/dawn/685):
 // These limits don't have tiers yet. Define two tiers with the same values since the macros
```
